title: narcissus × primulinus
intro: Narcissus × primulinus, also known as Primula x polyantha or Polyantha narcissus, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between the narcissus and primula species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus × primulinus include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and fever, as well as its potential to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
